makeSharesContract: Measured Needs are reviewable after measurement and before fit search; accept admits fit search, reject and remeasure-with-feedback block it.
useSharesContract: Present-fit-for-settlement-review surfaces quantized source-to-shares fit qualities and carries them into settlement AssetPack receipts.
productionParityContract: protocol-demonstration remains the low-level SPEC-IMPL and uapi routes remain the commercial SPEC-IMPL; both must preserve the same source-to-shares review, route-level reread, and settlement contract.
openReason: This proof advances the fifth-gate source-to-shares baseline without itself claiming fourth-gate procedural closure or full fifth-gate closure.

checks.label: Low-level protocol SPEC-IMPL emits reviewable Needs before fit search and carries source-to-shares artifacts into settlement receipts
Commercial production SPEC-IMPL preserves the protocol Need-review admission boundary and blocks fit search until accept

Commercial production SPEC-IMPL rereads accepted Need review, source-to-shares artifacts, settlement preview, and quantized fit-quality evidence through the app-owned state route after branch materialization
Commercial route reread proof checks the exact state-route assertions for accepted Need review, quantized source-to-shares continuity, private-file redaction, and settlement-proof carry-through

requiredEvidence.description: state route delegates principal-scoped reread to the protocol-backed app context

requiredEvidence.evidence: rereads accepted Need review and source-to-shares settlement artifacts through the commercial /api/state route
requiredEvidence.description: commercial parity test owns an explicit source-to-shares state-reread scenario
reread uses the buyer projection instead of inspecting only a branch response
reread asserts quantized source-to-shares fit-quality hash continuity
reread proves private raw branch files are not exposed through the buyer state projection
reread asserts settlement-source-to-shares proof carry-through

checks.label: Commercial production SPEC-IMPL records give, need, and closure writes into execution history and rereads them through the same Bitcode activity ledger
Commercial activity-ledger write proof checks completed Bitcode activity recording, normalized execution-history storage, and immediate reread ordering through the same route family

requiredEvidence.description: Terminal activity recordings default to completed Bitcode ledger writes
execution-history inserts persist terminal activity completion timestamps for reread

requiredEvidence.evidence: round-trips give, need, and closure writes through the same Bitcode activity ledger
requiredEvidence.description: commercial parity test proves give/need/closure writes reread through the same execution-history ledger
commercial parity test asserts newest-first reread ordering from the execution-history route

checks.label: Bitcode Terminal reads Need review, fit-search admission, quantized fit quality, and source-to-shares settlement as one closure sequence

Bitcode Terminal read proof checks the native closure and selected-detail assertions for Need review, present-fit settlement review, quantized fit-quality rows, and persisted source-to-shares detail carry-through

requiredEvidence.evidence: Read closure as one sequence from reviewable Need admission through verification, asset-pack branch materialization, source-to-shares settlement, and ledger continuity.
requiredEvidence.description: native Terminal closure card teaches the complete review-to-settlement sequence

requiredEvidence.evidence: { label: 'Fit search admitted', value: needReview.fitSearchAdmitted === true ? 'yes' : 'no' }
requiredEvidence.description: closure-state normalization exposes fit-search admission as Terminal read state
closure-state normalization preserves the quantized objective contract row
closure-state normalization preserves the source-to-shares reference row
closure-state normalization preserves the fit-quality hash row
native closure-state test asserts objective-contract visibility
native closure-state test asserts source-to-shares fit-quality detail
selected-detail snapshot preserves persisted fit-quality rows
selected-detail snapshot test asserts present-fit settlement review persistence
selected-detail snapshot test asserts source-to-shares fit-quality persistence

checks.label: Pipeline output semantics distinguish stable AssetPacks and written assets from delivered Shippables, with Finish as the broad final phase
